info.name: SolDecoders
info.description: GraphQL API for the SolDecoders Solana instruction decoder library.

body.raw: {"query":"query Decode($i: InstructionInput!){ decodeInstruction(input:$i){ success errorCode event { eventType programKind from to lamports } } }","variables":{"i":{"programId":"11111111111111111111111111111111","accounts":["11111111111111111111111111111112","11111111111111111111111111111113"],"dataBase64":"AgAAAADKmjsAAAAA"}}}

{"query":"query Tx($t: TransactionInput!){ decodeTransaction(input:$t){ success event { eventType } } }","variables":{"t":{"signatures":[],"instructions":[{"programId":"11111111111111111111111111111111","accounts":["11111111111111111111111111111112","11111111111111111111111111111113"],"dataBase64":"AgAAAADKmjsAAAAA"}]}}}
